'''Aquanna''' were huge, floating creatures indigenous to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] with air-filled, blimp-like bodies. They had cephalic lobes, giving them an artificial resemblance to rays and skates. [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] mounted heavy weaponry on these beasts, making them into living [[air cruiser]]s.

{{Creature-stub}}
